title: [InstCombine] Fold `X Pred C2 ? X BOp C1 : C2 BOp C1` to `min/max(X, C2) BOp C1`

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions sub is supported but all existing tests only demonstrate add operator. This tests the sub binary operator specifically.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i32 @sub_and_sgt(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %sub = sub i32 %x, 10
  %cmp = icmp sgt i32 %x, 20
  %s = select i1 %cmp, i32 %sub, i32 10
  ret i32 %s
}
=>
define i32 @sub_and_sgt(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %#1 = smax i32 %x, 20
  %s = add nsw i32 %#1, 4294967286
  ret i32 %s
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions unsigned predicates are supported but all existing tests use signed predicates (sgt, sle). This tests unsigned less-than (ult) with mul operator.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i16 @mul_and_ult(i16 %x) {
#0:
  %mul = mul i16 %x, 5
  %cmp = icmp ult i16 %x, 100
  %s = select i1 %cmp, i16 %mul, i16 500
  ret i16 %s
}
=>
define i16 @mul_and_ult(i16 %x) {
#0:
  %#1 = umin i16 %x, 100
  %s = mul nsw nuw i16 %#1, 5
  ret i16 %s
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions bitwise operations are supported but no existing tests demonstrate them. Also tests i64 width instead of i8, and unsigned greater-equal predicate.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i64 @and_and_uge(i64 %x) {
#0:
  %and = and i64 %x, 255
  %cmp = icmp uge i64 %x, 128
  %s = select i1 %cmp, i64 %and, i64 128
  ret i64 %s
}
=>
define i64 @and_and_uge(i64 %x) {
#0:
  %#1 = umax i64 %x, 128
  %s = and i64 %#1, 255
  ret i64 %s
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
